title: Portal pearl
description: Makes the pearl a little cooler.
body:
Makes the pearl a little cooler. This resourse pack makes the pearl look animated and makes it 8x8. This can be used in many instances like servers, bedwars, pearl fights, survival and just all aroud looking good.

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it:
zwhseton@gmail.com
